meta.title: Why I'm Hacking My Own Heart?
meta.description:
Dr. Marie Moe's keynote at the 2017 S4xEurope was one of the most personnel and emotional sessions we have ever seen at S4 Events. She has a pacemaker, so her stake in medical device security is high.

Two stories, one misconfiguration and one a bit-flip bug, of the pacemaker malfunction are eye opening. One pacemaker readout screen even shows a "Device is currently running a backup program", which may have saved her life.
